name: Pieczarki Nadziewane (Stuffed Mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9 to 10 inch square baking dish.
3. Separate mushroom caps and stems; set caps aside.
4. Finely chop stem pieces.
5. Melt butter over medium heat. Add onion; sauté until soft, about 3 minutes.
6. In a bowl, combine sauteed onion, chopped mushroom stems, bread crumbs, sour cream, and minced hard-cooked egg.
7. In another bowl, beat the remaining egg with a fork.
8. Add the beaten egg to the onion mixture.
9. Stir in parsley, salt, and pepper until blended.
10. Pack about 1 rounded teaspoon of stuffing mixture into each reserved mushroom cap.
11. Arrange, stuffing-side up, in the greased dish.
12. Place 1 cheese square on each cap.
13. Bake, uncovered, for 20-25 minutes.
